title: Data Analysis with Python Bootcamp
subtitle: Become a Data Analyst with Python, Pandas & Real Business Projects
description: Learn how to clean, analyze, and visualize data using Python. Build real-world projects and become job-ready for data analyst roles.

projects.title: Sales Data Analysis Project
projects.description: Clean and analyze structured business data.

projects.title: eCommerce Data Cleaning Project
projects.description: Handle real-world messy datasets and clean outliers.

projects.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Project
projects.description: Find trends, patterns, and insights in user behavior data.

curriculum.title: Python Foundations & Data Cleaning

lessons.title: Python Basics for Data Analysis: Variables & Lists
Pandas Intro: Series, DataFrames & Reading CSV/Excel

curriculum.practice: Clean eCommerce dataset containing messy user entries
curriculum.outcome: Can write python code and clean unstructured real-world datasets.

curriculum.title: Analysis & Visualization

lessons.title: Data Visualization with Matplotlib & Seaborn: Line, Bar & Scatter charts
Deriving Business KPIs and Insights from Clean Datasets

curriculum.practice: Generate a business insights report for sales and marketing teams
curriculum.outcome: Students visualize data patterns and deliver insightful business summaries.

curriculum.title: Statistics & Capstone

lessons.title: Data Analyst Portfolio Polish & Mock Interviews

curriculum.practice: Build an end-to-end data analysis pipeline from raw data to final report
curriculum.outcome: Graduates build portfolio projects and crack data analyst interviews.

features: Learn Pandas, EDA, Visualization, Statistics end-to-end
Work on real datasets (sales, eCommerce, marketing)
Focus on business insights, not just coding
